note: Authoritative copy of docs/bench/utterances.md — the two must stay in sync.

references.U01: Order two hydraulic filters for the spiker before Thursday
references.U02: The tamper's left workhead is leaking and needs a seal kit
references.U03: Remind me to torque the clamp bolts on the anchor machine at lunch
references.U04: Log four hours on unit seventy three for the generator swap
references.U05: Grab a box of five eighths spikes from the material truck
references.U06: Tell the foreman the regulator threw a hose by the crossing
references.U07: Schedule the five hundred hour service on the tie crane for Monday
references.U08: The spiker gun on the left side is double firing again
references.U09: Add a brake chamber for the tie handler to the parts list
references.U10: Check the coolant level on unit forty one before we head out
references.U11: The bone yard has a spare workhead, have the truck bring it up
references.U12: Two ties skipped at the county road crossing, flag them for the tamper
references.U13: We need diesel exhaust fluid for both tampers by Wednesday
references.U14: The clip machine jammed twice this morning, the cylinder is dragging
references.U15: Note that the spike puller blew a fitting near mile post two twelve
references.U16: Swap the batteries on the rail drill and put it on charge
references.U17: The kicker pads on the second spiker are worn to the metal
references.U18: Call the dealer about the warranty claim on the new tamper screen
references.U19: Pick up hydraulic oil, two drums, when you fuel the trucks
references.U20: End of shift, machines tied down clear of the main at the siding
